ab: tucu a qadav nu masulesulem, muri sema umaq a ku kaka ti Ljegeay.
ch: 今天傍晚，Ljegeay弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother Ljegeay is going home this evening.

ab: na vayk amen kati vuvu i Sauniav a matatakayan a veneli tua kuka, muri nia kesain a semanguanguaq tua pinadjulu tu kaiven ni Ljegeay a ku kaka.
ch: 我和Sauniav奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給Ljegeay弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: ka cemalivat amen tua temakatakay ta ljaceng, aza sitakatakay a ljaceng liva anan azua namilidji a tjaukaljaceng.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，攤子有好多鮮嫩的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: na veneli anga amen tua incay, tua qaqilj kata qudidilj a caytav.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: aza i tjuljivar a temakatakay tua vangalj a rutakatakay qivu a matucu, “aicu a ku pangudral kata qudis qaljemeqem aravac. pay veliu a pupida lja aya!”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: na veneli amen tua pangudral kata qudis.
ka cemalivat amen tua temakatakay tua vutjulj, aza rutakatakay qivu a matucu, “anema su velin? aicu a kuka a vuaq kakudralan saka na venutjulj, nu taitan tjelu a iday a vatanan.” aya.
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，攤販說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大隻又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: paka pazangal aravac ti vuvu i Sauniav, pay sa kivadaq tua za rutakatakay tu aki makaya patjamadjuluin.
ch: Sauniav奶奶覺得太貴了，並且問攤販可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: ljakua azua rutakatakay matucu sinipumadjulu anga aravac, inika anga makaya patjamadjuluin aya.
ch: 但攤販說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: azuwa i ljaqedi a rutakatakay matucu a qivu, kelju veliu tua ku ciqav, aicu a ku ciqav kakudrakudralan saka madjulu aya.
ch: 隔壁的攤販說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: ka vililj anga veneli anga amen tua kuka sane veli uta tua ciqav, sa satjumaq a kemsa tu tadataran tua djamay.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: cuay anga kiljaljavaljava, mizemzem anga qadav.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: na papangtjez tua ljingas a ku kaka ti Ljegeay a matucu, na papintjus aza i pusivitjayan tu inika makaya pulavay, nu tjaivililj anga sipulavayan a qinadavan mana mangtjez anga aken aya.
ch: Ljegeay弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: matucu a qivu ti vuvu i Sauniav liav a ku kinsa, pay pukanui a masantalj aya.
ch: Sauniav奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: na cemged amen tua mareka nia vetjek tua nia adjuadju, a kipumangtjez a kipatjinguaq tua napenakakaizuan a kaiven.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
